tldr_zh: OpenAI發布首款自研推理芯片Jalapeño，Google Gemini 3.5新增電腦操作能力，AI芯片競賽升溫。
tldr_en: OpenAI unveils Jalapeño inference chip with Broadcom, Google adds computer use to Gemini 3.5 Flash, AI chip race intensifies.

items.title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil Jalapeño LLM Inference Chip
items.summary_zh: OpenAI與芯片製造商Broadcom聯合推出自研推理芯片Jalapeño，專為大語言模型推理優化，旨在提升AI系統的性能、效率和規模。此舉標誌著OpenAI進入芯片自主研發領域，加劇AI芯片市場競爭。
items.summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom introduced Jalapeño, a custom AI inference chip optimized for large language models to improve performance, efficiency, and scale. This marks OpenAI's entry into custom chip development, intensifying competition in the AI chip market.

items.title_zh: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash新增電腦操作功能
items.title_en: Computer Use Now Available in Gemini 3.5 Flash
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind宣布在Gemini 3.5 Flash模型中引入電腦操作能力，使AI能直接與電腦互動、控制應用程式和執行複雜任務。此功能提升了AI代理的自主性和實用性，推進AI在自動化領域的應用。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind announced computer use capabilities in Gemini 3.5 Flash, enabling AI to directly interact with computers and execute complex tasks. This advancement enhances AI agent autonomy and practical applications in automation.

items.title_zh: Nvidia推出BioNeMo AI代理工具加速藥物研發
items.title_en: Nvidia Launches BioNeMo Agent Toolkit for Drug Discovery
items.summary_zh: Nvidia推出BioNeMo Agent Toolkit，將蛋白質設計、分子模擬、基因組分析等生命科學工具封裝為AI代理可調用的能力，讓研究人員能打造具專業科學知識的AI代理，將藥物篩選時間從數天縮短到分鐘級別。
items.summary_en: Nvidia launched BioNeMo Agent Toolkit that packages protein design, molecular simulation, and genomic analysis tools as AI-callable skills, enabling researchers to build specialized AI agents that accelerate drug discovery from days to minutes.

items.title_zh: 研究團隊開發Rex框架提高生成式AI回推精準度
items.title_en: Rex Framework Improves Generative AI Reversibility for Scientific Applications
items.summary_zh: 美國克拉克森大學研究團隊開發Rex數學框架，提高擴散模型和流匹配模型的可逆性，讓AI在生成圖片、設計分子或進行科學模擬時更準確地「倒帶」，減少重新生成時的失真，已被ICML 2026會議接受發表。
items.summary_en: Clarkson University researchers developed the Rex framework to enhance reversibility in diffusion and flow-matching models, enabling AI to more accurately backtrack through generation processes for drug design and scientific simulations with reduced distortion.

items.title_zh: Google頂級研究員轉投Anthropic，人才流失加劇
items.title_en: Top Google AI Researchers Continue Exodus to Anthropic
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind的頂級AI研究員Jonas Adler和Alexander Pritzel轉投Anthropic，繼Noam Shazeer和John Jumper之後再度流失關鍵人才。此舉反映Anthropic在吸引業界頂尖人才方面的競爭力提升，也凸顯Google在AI人才保留方面的挑戰。
items.summary_en: Senior Google AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel joined Anthropic, continuing a trend of talent departures including Noam Shazeer and John Jumper. This reflects Anthropic's growing ability to attract elite talent and Google's challenges in retention.

items.title_zh: Microsoft遭質疑量子芯片聲稱被誇大
items.title_en: Nature Disputes Microsoft's Quantum Computing Breakthrough Claims
items.summary_zh: 學術期刊Nature發表評論質疑Microsoft去年推出的量子芯片Majorana 1的基礎技術，認為其宣稱的拓撲量子位革命性突破遭到誇大。此批評對Microsoft的量子計算發展路線構成重大質疑。
items.summary_en: Nature published a critique questioning the fundamental technology behind Microsoft's 'breakthrough' Majorana 1 quantum chip, disputing claims about topological qubits as building blocks for future quantum computers.

items.title_zh: Microsoft推低配版Surface產品佔領千元價位
items.title_en: Microsoft Launches Budget Surface Pro and Laptop with 8GB RAM
items.summary_zh: Microsoft新推12英寸Surface Pro和13英寸Surface Laptop的低配版本，搭載8GB RAM而非16GB，定價分別為$849和$949，進一步覆蓋入門級市場。此舉反映科技廠商應對經濟壓力和市場競爭的策略調整。
items.summary_en: Microsoft introduced cheaper Surface Pro (12-inch, $849) and Surface Laptop (13-inch, $949) models with 8GB RAM instead of 16GB, targeting budget-conscious consumers and expanding market coverage.

items.title_zh: 美光芯片營收暴增四倍，AI需求持續強勁
items.title_en: Micron's Revenue Soars 4x Amid Strong AI Demand
items.summary_zh: 美光科技發布財報顯示營收較去年同期增長四倍至414.5億美元，利潤大幅躍升至28.2億美元，反映記憶體芯片供應緊張與AI基礎設施投資驅動的強勁需求。盤後股價大漲超15%，彰顯市場對AI芯片前景的樂觀預期。
items.summary_en: Micron reported revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion with profit soaring from $1.88 billion to $28.2 billion, driven by memory chip shortages and strong AI infrastructure investment demand, causing stock to jump 15% after-hours.

items.title_zh: Swift Package Index併入Apple，強化套件安全機制
items.title_en: Apple Acquires Swift Package Index to Enhance Security
items.summary_zh: Swift Package Index團隊正式加入Apple，雙方將在既有套件索引和相容性測試基礎上，建立更完整的Swift套件註冊庫。Apple將投入資源強化Swift套件的簽章、身分識別和發現能力，提升開發者生態安全性。
items.summary_en: Swift Package Index team joined Apple to develop a more comprehensive Swift package registry. Apple will enhance package discovery, evaluation, signing, and identity verification to strengthen ecosystem security.

items.title_zh: WordPress外掛供應鏈攻擊波及40萬用戶
items.title_en: ShapedPlugin Supply Chain Attack Impacts 400K WordPress Users
items.summary_zh: 資安業者Wordfence揭露WordPress外掛開發商ShapedPlugin遭供應鏈攻擊，攻擊者入侵其基礎設施後將惡意程式碼植入多款Pro版外掛並透過官方更新機制散布，影響近40萬個系統安裝量。此事件再次凸顯軟體供應鏈安全風險。
items.summary_en: Wordfence disclosed that ShapedPlugin, a WordPress plugin developer with 400K installations, suffered a supply chain attack with malicious code injected into premium plugins and distributed via official update mechanisms.

items.title_zh: 西歐遭熱浪襲擊，法國創紀錄高溫
items.title_en: Record Heat Sweeps Western Europe, France Hits New Temperature High
items.summary_zh: 法國、英國、西班牙等西歐地區遭歷史級熱浪席捲，法國創造新的最高溫紀錄。數千萬民眾經歷創紀錄高溫，多地發布紅色熱警報。極端氣候事件推升歐洲對空調等降溫設備的需求。
items.summary_en: France, UK, and Spain experience record-breaking heat waves affecting tens of millions. France records its hottest day on record with widespread red heat alerts across Western Europe.

items.title_zh: 委內瑞拉遭規模7.1強震襲擊，卡拉卡斯建築倒塌
items.title_en: 7.1 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Venezuela, Buildings Collapse in Caracas
items.summary_zh: 規模7.1強震襲擊委內瑞拉，震央位於莫隆社區西方約168公里處，深度13公里。首都卡拉卡斯多棟建築倒塌，民眾驚慌疏散。委內瑞拉已排除發生海嘯可能性。
items.summary_en: A powerful 7.1 magnitude earthquake struck Venezuela with epicenter west of Morón, causing building collapses in capital Caracas. The earthquake was 13 kilometers deep with no tsunami warning issued.
